whats_working: Codebase Onboarding Docs Skills Pack has 17 total downloads, the only product with real traction.
ClaudeAI post on Codebase Onboarding got 6 comments, the most engagement of any Reddit post.
Free pricing is lowering the barrier to download, which works for building an early audience.
Reddit activity is sparse overall. Only 6 posts, all scoring 0-1. No clear pattern to build on yet.
what_to_fix: 35+ products have zero downloads. Stop adding new products until existing ones get traffic.
Most Reddit posts lead with the solution, not the problem. Reframe titles around the reader's pain.
r/buildinpublic post scored 0. The angle was too vague. Specific numbers and outcomes drive clicks.
8 paid Claude Code packs at $5 have zero sales. No one knows they exist. Promote free ones first to build trust.

next_reddit_posts.angle: Onboarding a new dev to a large codebase takes weeks. Here is how I use Claude Code to cut that down.
next_reddit_posts.product: Claude Code Skills Pack: Codebase Onboarding Docs
next_reddit_posts.why: This subreddit has active devs who feel this pain daily. Free product lowers friction to click.

next_reddit_posts.angle: I kept forgetting to update the README every release. So I built a Claude Code skill that does it automatically.
next_reddit_posts.why: Relatable solo dev problem. Free product. Concrete before/after makes it easy to upvote.

next_reddit_posts.angle: My n8n workflow kept failing on API auth. I wrote prompts to debug every auth type faster.
next_reddit_posts.product: n8n API Authentication Troubleshooting Prompts by Auth Type
next_reddit_posts.why: Auth errors are a top n8n frustration. Problem-first angle fits nocode community well.

next_reddit_posts.angle: I was spending 3 hours a week on client reports. Here is the n8n workflow that automated all of it.
next_reddit_posts.product: Claude Code Skills Pack: Automated Report Generation
next_reddit_posts.why: Entrepreneurs care about time savings. Specific hours saved makes the post credible and shareable.

next_reddit_posts.angle: I built 30+ free digital products and only one got downloads. Here is what I learned about distribution.
next_reddit_posts.why: Buildinpublic honesty post drives profile visits and trust. Links to catalog naturally in comments.
